tags.name: slide-container
tags.description: Slider root. Contains <slide-set> and optional <slide-next>/<slide-previous> controls.

attributes.name: active
attributes.description: Optional. Zero-based index of the initially active slide. Defaults to 0.

tags.name: slide-set
tags.description: Wrapper for one or more <slide-window> items.

tags.name: slide-window
tags.description: A single slide pane. Any HTML content can go here.

tags.name: slide-next
tags.description: Moves the slider to the next slide.

tags.name: slide-previous
tags.description: Moves the slider to the previous slide.
